publishedAbstract: When installing `odf-operator` in disconnected cluster using `oc-mirror v2` fails with below error: ~~~ constraints not satisfiable: bundle odf-operator.v4.16.6-rhodf requires an operator with package: recipe and with version in range: > =4.9.0 <=4.16.6, subscription odf-operator exists, subscription odf-operator requires redhat-operator-index/openshift-marketplace/stable-4.16/odf-operator.v4.16.6-rhodf ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF operator installation failing in disconnected cluster
